phrases.intent_en: Ask where to get my pilgrim stamp
phrases.text_local: Onde posso carimbar o meu passaporte de peregrino?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo kuh-reem-BAHR AW MEHOO puh-suh-PAW-ruh-tih DIH peh-rihg-REE-noo?
phrases.cultural_note: The pilgrim stamp (carimbo) is a tradition for those walking the Camino de Santiago. Braga's Tourist Office offers this service for pilgrims.

likely_response.local: Dirija-se ao posto de carimbo do passaporte de peregrino.
likely_response.pronunciation: dee-REE-zhuh-SIH OW POHSH-too DIH kuh-REEM-boo DOO puh-suh-PAW-ruh-tih DIH peh-rihg-REE-noo.
likely_response.translation_en: Go to the pilgrim passport stamp station.

responses.english: Go to the pilgrim passport stamp station.
responses.phonetic: dee-REE-zhuh-SIH OW POHSH-too DIH kuh-REEM-boo DOO puh-suh-PAW-ruh-tih DIH peh-rihg-REE-noo.
responses.french: Dirija-se ao posto de carimbo do passaporte de peregrino.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar os mapas da cidade?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR OOSH MAH-puhsh DUH see-DAH-dih?
phrases.cultural_note: Portuguese tourist offices provide free municipal maps. Staff prefer direct, concise inquiries.

likely_response.local: Os mapas estão no expositor de mapas.
likely_response.pronunciation: OOSH MAH-puhsh ihsh-TOWN NOO ehsh-poo-zee-TOHR DIH MAH-puhsh.
likely_response.translation_en: The maps are at the map rack.

responses.english: The maps are at the map rack.
responses.phonetic: OOSH MAH-puhsh ihsh-TOWN NOO ehsh-poo-zee-TOHR DIH MAH-puhsh.
responses.french: Os mapas estão no expositor de mapas.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to buy the Braga Card
phrases.text_local: Olá, onde posso comprar o Braga Card?
phrases.pronunciation: aw-LAH, OHNG-dih PAW-soo koomp-RAHR AW BRAH-guh KAH-ruhd?
phrases.cultural_note: The Braga Card offers discounts on attractions and transport; it is sold at the tourist office.

likely_response.local: No balcão de vendas, à direita.
likely_response.pronunciation: NOO bahl-KOWN DIH VAYNG-duhsh, AH dee-RAY-tuh.
likely_response.translation_en: At the sales desk, on the right.

responses.english: At the sales desk, on the right.
responses.phonetic: NOO bahl-KOWN DIH VAYNG-duhsh, AH dee-RAY-tuh.
responses.french: No balcão de vendas, à direita.

phrases.text_local: Olá, onde posso guardar a bagagem?
phrases.pronunciation: aw-LAH, OHNG-dih PAW-soo gwuh-ruh-DAHR AH buh-GAH-zhayng?
phrases.cultural_note: Luggage lockers are usually coin-operated; ask at the counter for change if needed.

likely_response.local: Nos cacifos de bagagem, ao fundo.
likely_response.pronunciation: NOOSH kuh-SEE-foosh DIH buh-GAH-zhayng, OW FOONNG-doo.
likely_response.translation_en: In the luggage lockers, at the back.

responses.english: In the luggage lockers, at the back.
responses.phonetic: NOOSH kuh-SEE-foosh DIH buh-GAH-zhayng, OW FOONNG-doo.
responses.french: Nos cacifos de bagagem, ao fundo.
